steps.title: Use the team context
steps.content: The study included both engineers and entomologists. The passage says the involvement of experts from both disciplines created a more comprehensive approach than either discipline could have achieved independently.

steps.title: Pick the joint-work noun
steps.content: Choice A suggests doubt, Choice B suggests overstatement, and Choice C suggests lack of trust. All conflict with the positive result of combining two fields. The blank needs a word for experts working together. The answer is D.
